system.description: Welding gear consists of an oxyacetylene torch and tanks, welding goggles, leathers, and a striker. It can be used to cut or fuse metal together. The tanks hold enough gas for 12 welds or cuts. It’s up to the GM to decide whether trying to cut a human size hole in a metal wall will take 1 cut or, more likely, most of the gas. Using the tanks while repairing the train provides +2d to the Locomotive check and uses 4 welds per Quarter.
